If.name: If
If.description: Executes one of two execution outputs based on the value of the input condition. If the condition is true, the top execution output will be used, and if the condition is false, the bottom execution output will be used.

static.name: Run
static.description: The execution input to trigger the condition check

static.name: Condition
static.description: The condition to evaluate

static.name: Then
static.description: The execution output if the condition is true

static.name: Else
static.description: The execution output if the condition is false

And.name: And
And.description: Executes the output if all input conditions are true. If any condition is false, the output will not be executed.

dynamic.name: Input
dynamic.description: The input value to be evaluated

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value if all conditions are true

Or.name: Or
Or.description: Executes the output if any input condition is true. If all conditions are false, the output will not be executed.

dynamic.name: Input
dynamic.description: The input value to be evaluated

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value if any condition is true

Not.name: Not
Not.description: Inverts the input condition. If the input is true, the output will be false, and vice versa.

static.name: Input
static.description: The input value to be inverted

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value is the inverse of the input

Xor.name: Xor
Xor.description: Executes the output if exactly one input condition is true. If none or more than one condition is true, the output will not be executed.

dynamic.name: Input
dynamic.description: The input value to be evaluated

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value if exactly one condition is true

Nand.name: Nand
Nand.description: Executes the output if not all input conditions are true. If all conditions are true, the output will not be executed.

dynamic.name: Input
dynamic.description: The input value to be evaluated

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value if not all conditions are true

Add.name: Add
Add.description: Executes the output by adding all input values. The result is the sum of all input values.

dynamic.name: Input
dynamic.description: The input value to be added

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the sum of all input values

Subtract.name: Subtract
Subtract.description: Executes the output by subtracting all input values. The result is the difference of all input values.

dynamic.name: Input
dynamic.description: The input value to be subtracted

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the difference of all input values

Multiply.name: Multiply
Multiply.description: Executes the output by multiplying all input values. The result is the product of all input values.

dynamic.name: Input
dynamic.description: The input value to be multiplied

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the product of all input values

Divide.name: Divide
Divide.description: Executes the output by dividing all input values. The result is the quotient of all input values.

dynamic.name: Input
dynamic.description: The input value to be divided

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the quotient of all input values

Modulo.name: Modulo
Modulo.description: Executes the output by calculating the remainder of the division of all input values. The result is the remainder of the division of all input values.

dynamic.name: Input
dynamic.description: The input value to be divided

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the remainder of the division of all input values

Clamp.name: Clamp
Clamp.description: Executes the output by clamping the input value between a minimum and maximum value.

static.name: Value
static.description: The value to be clamped

static.name: Min
static.description: The minimum value to clamp to

static.name: Max
static.description: The maximum value to clamp to

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the clamped value between the minimum and maximum

Abs.name: Abs
Abs.description: Executes the output by calculating the absolute value of the input. The result is the absolute value of the input.

static.name: Input
static.description: The input value to calculate the absolute value for

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the absolute value of the input

Sin.name: Sin
Sin.description: Executes the output by calculating the sine of the input. The result is the sine of the input.

static.name: Input
static.description: The input value to calculate the sine for

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the sine of the input

Cos.name: Cos
Cos.description: Executes the output by calculating the cosine of the input. The result is the cosine of the input.

static.name: Input
static.description: The input value to calculate the cosine for

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the cosine of the input

Tan.name: Tan
Tan.description: Executes the output by calculating the tangent of the input. The result is the tangent of the input.

static.name: Input
static.description: The input value to calculate the tangent for

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the tangent of the input

Asin.name: Asin
Asin.description: Executes the output by calculating the arcsine of the input. The result is the arcsine of the input.

static.name: Input
static.description: The input value to calculate the arcsine for

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the arcsine of the input

Acos.name: Acos
Acos.description: Executes the output by calculating the arccosine of the input. The result is the arccosine of the input.

static.name: Input
static.description: The input value to calculate the arccosine for

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the arccosine of the input

Atan.name: Atan
Atan.description: Executes the output by calculating the arctangent of the input. The result is the arctangent of the input.

static.name: Input
static.description: The input value to calculate the arctangent for

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the arctangent of the input

Atan2.name: Atan2
Atan2.description: Executes the output by calculating the arctangent of two inputs. The result is the angle for the provided Y and X values.

static.name: Y
static.description: The Y value used to calculate the arctangent.

static.name: X
static.description: The X value used to calculate the arctangent.

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the arctangent of the provided Y and X values.

Equals.name: Equals
Equals.description: Executes the output by comparing two input values for equality. The result is true if the inputs are equal, false otherwise.

dynamic.name: Input
dynamic.description: The input to define the value to compare against. All inputs will be compared to each other for equality

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is true if the inputs are equal, false otherwise

Not Equals.name: Not Equals
Not Equals.description: Executes the output by comparing two input values for inequality. The result is true if the inputs are not equal, false otherwise.

dynamic.name: Input
dynamic.description: The input to define the value to compare against. All inputs will be compared to each other for inequality

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is true if the inputs are not equal, false otherwise

Greater Than.name: Greater Than
Greater Than.description: Executes the output by comparing two input values. The result is true if the first input is greater than the second input, false otherwise.

dynamic.name: Input
dynamic.description: The input to define the value to compare against. All inputs will be compared to each other for the 'greater than' condition

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is true if the first input is greater than the second input, false otherwise

Less Than.name: Less Than
Less Than.description: Executes the output by comparing two input values. The result is true if the first input is less than the second input, false otherwise.

dynamic.name: Input
dynamic.description: The input to define the value to compare against. All inputs will be compared to each other for the 'less than' condition

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is true if the first input is less than the second input, false otherwise

Greater Than Or Equal.name: Greater Than Or Equal
Greater Than Or Equal.description: Executes the output by comparing two input values. The result is true if the first input is greater than or equal to the second input, false otherwise.

dynamic.name: Input
dynamic.description: The input to define the value to compare against. All inputs will be compared to each other for the 'greater than or equal' condition

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is true if the first input is greater than or equal to the second input, false otherwise

Less Than Or Equal.name: Less Than Or Equal
Less Than Or Equal.description: Executes the output by comparing two input values. The result is true if the first input is less than or equal to the second input, false otherwise.

dynamic.name: Input
dynamic.description: The input to define the value to compare against. All inputs will be compared to each other for the 'less than or equal' condition

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is true if the first input is less than or equal to the second input, false otherwise

Delay.name: Delay
Delay.description: Delays the execution of the output by a specified amount of time.

static.name: Exec
static.description: The execution input to trigger the delay.

static.name: Ticks
static.description: The number of ticks to delay the execution of the output.

static.name: Cancel
static.description: The execution input to cancel the delay.

static.name: Run
static.description: The execution output triggered when the delay starts.

static.name: After Delay
static.description: The execution output triggered after the delay has completed.

static.name: Cancel
static.description: The execution output triggered when the delay is canceled.

Floor.name: Floor
Floor.description: Rounds down the input value to the nearest integer.

static.name: Value
static.description: The input value to be rounded down.

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the input value rounded down to the nearest integer.

Ceil.name: Ceil
Ceil.description: Rounds up the input value to the nearest integer.

static.name: Value
static.description: The input value to be rounded up.

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the input value rounded up to the nearest integer.

Round.name: Round
Round.description: Rounds the input value to the nearest integer.

static.name: Value
static.description: The input value to be rounded.

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the input value rounded to the nearest integer.

Min.name: Min
Min.description: Returns the minimum value among the inputs.

dynamic.name: Value
dynamic.description: The input value to be compared.

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the minimum value among the inputs.

Max.name: Max
Max.description: Returns the maximum value among the inputs.

dynamic.name: Value
dynamic.description: The input value to be compared.

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the maximum value among the inputs.

Lerp.name: Lerp
Lerp.description: Linearly interpolates between two values based on a given factor.

static.name: Start
static.description: The starting value for interpolation.

static.name: End
static.description: The ending value for interpolation.

static.name: Progress
static.description: The interpolation factor between 0 and 1.

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the interpolation factor based on the given value.

Inverse Lerp.name: Inverse Lerp
Inverse Lerp.description: Calculates the interpolation factor between two values based on a given value.

static.name: Start
static.description: The starting value for interpolation.

static.name: End
static.description: The ending value for interpolation.

static.name: Value
static.description: The value for which to calculate the interpolation factor.

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the interpolation factor based on the given value.

Lerp Unclamped.name: Lerp Unclamped
Lerp Unclamped.description: Linearly interpolates between two values based on a given factor without clamping the factor between 0 and 1.

static.name: Start
static.description: The starting value for interpolation.

static.name: End
static.description: The ending value for interpolation.

static.name: Progress
static.description: The interpolation factor.

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the interpolation factor based on the given value.

Distance.name: Distance
Distance.description: Calculates the distance between two values.

static.name: A
static.description: The starting value for distance calculation.

static.name: B
static.description: The ending value for distance calculation.

static.name: Distance
static.description: The output value which is the distance between the two input values.

Vector3 Create.name: Vector3 Create
Vector3 Create.description: Creates a Vector3 value from individual components.

static.name: X
static.description: The X component of the Vector3.

static.name: Y
static.description: The Y component of the Vector3.

static.name: Z
static.description: The Z component of the Vector3.

static.name: Vector3
static.description: The output Vector3 value created from the input components.

Vector3 Split.name: Vector3 Split
Vector3 Split.description: Splits a Vector3 value into individual components.

static.name: Vector3
static.description: The input Vector3 value to be split into individual components.

static.name: X
static.description: The X component of the input Vector3 value.

static.name: Y
static.description: The Y component of the input Vector3 value.

static.name: Z
static.description: The Z component of the input Vector3 value.

static.name: Vector3
static.description: The input Vector3 value to be normalized.

static.name: Results
static.description: The normalized Vector3 value.

Vector3 Dot.name: Vector3 Dot
Vector3 Dot.description: Calculates the dot product of two Vector3 values.

static.name: LHS
static.description: The left-hand side Vector3 value for the dot product.

static.name: RHS
static.description: The right-hand side Vector3 value for the dot product.

static.name: Result
static.description: The dot product of the two input Vector3 values.

Vector3 Cross.name: Vector3 Cross
Vector3 Cross.description: Calculates the cross product of two Vector3 values.

static.name: LHS
static.description: The left-hand side Vector3 value for the cross product.

static.name: RHS
static.description: The right-hand side Vector3 value for the cross product.

static.name: Result
static.description: The cross product of the two input Vector3 values.

API Request.name: API Request
API Request.description: Sends a request to the API with the specified data.

static.name: Trigger
static.description: The execution input to trigger the API request.

static.name: API
static.description: The API endpoint to send the request to.

static.name: Run
static.description: The execution output triggered when the API request is sent.

static.name: On Response
static.description: The execution output triggered when the API request receives a response.

static.name: Success
static.description: Indicates whether the API request was successful.

static.name: Response Code
static.description: The response code received from the API request.

static.name: Data
static.description: The data retrieved from the API corresponding to the specified URL.

Command Get Sender.name: Command Get Sender
Command Get Sender.description: Gets the sender of the command.

static.name: Command
static.description: The command input to get the sender from.

static.name: Sender
static.description: The player who sent the command.

Command Get Arguments.name: Command Get Arguments
Command Get Arguments.description: Gets the arguments of the command.

static.name: Command
static.description: The command input to get the arguments from.

static.name: Arguments
static.description: The arguments of the command.

Get All Players.name: Get All Players
Get All Players.description: Gets a list of all players currently in the game.

static.name: Players
static.description: The list of all players currently in the game.

Get Player Count.name: Get Player Count
Get Player Count.description: Gets the count of all players currently in the game.

static.name: Player Count
static.description: The count of all players currently in the game.

Get Player By Name.name: Get Player By Name
Get Player By Name.description: Gets a player by their name.

static.name: Name
static.description: The name of the player to get.

static.name: Player
static.description: The player with the specified name, or null if no such player exists.

Get Player By UUID.name: Get Player By UUID
Get Player By UUID.description: Gets a player by their UUID.

static.name: UUID
static.description: The UUID of the player to get.

static.name: Player
static.description: The player with the specified UUID, or null if no such player exists.

Play Audio At Position.name: Play Audio At Position
Play Audio At Position.description: Plays an audio clip at a specified position in the game world.

static.name: Trigger
static.description: The execution input to trigger the audio playback.

static.name: Audio Clip
static.description: The audio clip to be played.

static.name: Position
static.description: The position in the game world where the audio should be played.

static.name: Volume
static.description: The volume at which the audio should be played, where 1 is full volume and 0 is silent.

static.name: Run
static.description: The execution output that triggers when the audio starts playing.

static.name: On Complete
static.description: The execution output that triggers when the audio finishes playing.

Get Position.name: Get Position
Get Position.description: Gets the position of a specified entity in the game world.

static.description: The entity to get the position of.

static.name: Position
static.description: The position of the specified entity in the game world.

Execution Integer Switch.name: Execution Integer Switch
Execution Integer Switch.description: Executes different outputs based on the value of an integer input.

static.name: Exec
static.description: The execution input to trigger the switch.

static.name: Value
static.description: The integer value to switch on.

static.name: Failed
static.description: The default execution output triggered when the input value does not match any of the defined cases.

dynamic.name: {dynamic_port_index}
dynamic.description: The execution output for a specific case, where the case number corresponds to the integer value input.

Execution String Switch.name: Execution String Switch
Execution String Switch.description: Executes different outputs based on the value of a string input.

static.name: Exec
static.description: The execution input to trigger the switch.

static.name: Value
static.description: The string value to switch on.

static.name: Failed
static.description: The default execution output triggered when the input value does not match any of the defined cases.

dynamic.name: {dynamic_port_index}
dynamic.description: The execution output for a specific case, where the case number corresponds to the string value input.

Value Integer Switch.name: Value Integer Switch
Value Integer Switch.description: Outputs different values based on the value of an integer input.

static.name: Value
static.description: The integer value to switch on.

static.name: Failed
static.description: The default output value when the input value does not match any of the defined cases.

dynamic.name: {dynamic_port_index}
dynamic.description: The output value for a specific case, where the case number corresponds to the integer value input.

Value String Switch.name: Value String Switch
Value String Switch.description: Outputs different values based on the value of a string input.

static.name: Value
static.description: The string value to switch on.

static.name: Failed
static.description: The default output value when the input value does not match any of the defined cases.

dynamic.name: {dynamic_port_index}
dynamic.description: The output value for a specific case, where the case number corresponds to the string value input.

For.name: For
For.description: Executes a loop a specified number of times.

static.name: Run
static.description: The execution input to trigger the loop.

static.name: From (Inclusive)
static.description: The starting value of the loop (inclusive).

static.name: To (Exclusive)
static.description: The ending value of the loop (exclusive).

static.name: Loop
static.description: The execution output triggered for each iteration of the loop.

static.name: Index
static.description: The current index of the loop iteration, starting from the 'From' value and incrementing by 1 each time until it reaches the 'To' value.

static.name: Done
static.description: The execution output triggered when the loop has completed all iterations.

For Each.name: For Each
For Each.description: Executes a loop for each item in a list.

static.name: Run
static.description: The execution input to trigger the loop.

static.name: List
static.description: The list of items to loop through.

static.name: Loop
static.description: The execution output triggered for each iteration of the loop.

static.name: Item
static.description: The current item from the list for this iteration of the loop.

static.name: Index
static.description: The current index of the loop iteration, starting from 0 and incrementing by 1 each time until it reaches the length of the list minus one.

static.name: Done
static.description: The execution output triggered when the loop has completed all iterations.

Sequence.name: Sequence
Sequence.description: Executes a series of outputs in order.

static.name: Run
static.description: The execution input to trigger the sequence.

dynamic.name: {dynamic_port_index}
dynamic.description: The execution outputs that are triggered in order when the sequence is executed

Ceil to Int.name: Ceil to Int
Ceil to Int.description: Rounds up the input value to the nearest integer and outputs it as an integer type.

static.name: Value
static.description: The input value to be rounded up.

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the input value rounded up to the nearest integer, output as an integer type.

Color To HSV.name: Color To HSV
Color To HSV.description: Converts a color value to its HSV (Hue, Saturation, Value) representation.

static.name: Color
static.description: The input color value to be converted to HSV.

static.name: Hue
static.description: The output Hue component of the HSV representation of the input color (0-360).

static.name: Saturation
static.description: The output Saturation component of the HSV representation of the input color (0-1).

static.name: Value
static.description: The output Value component of the HSV representation of the input color (0-1).

Color to RGB.name: Color to RGB
Color to RGB.description: Converts a color value to its RGB (Red, Green, Blue) representation.

static.name: Color
static.description: The input color value to be converted to RGB.

static.name: Red
static.description: The output Red component of the RGB representation of the input color (0-255).

static.name: Green
static.description: The output Green component of the RGB representation of the input color (0-255).

static.name: Blue
static.description: The output Blue component of the RGB representation of the input color (0-255).

Floor to Int.name: Floor to Int
Floor to Int.description: Rounds down the input value to the nearest integer and outputs it as an integer type.

static.name: Value
static.description: The input value to be rounded down.

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the input value rounded down to the nearest integer, output as an integer type.

Int to Float.name: Int to Float
Int to Float.description: Converts an integer value to a float value.

static.name: Value
static.description: The input integer value to be converted to float.

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the input integer converted to a float value.

Round to Int.name: Round to Int
Round to Int.description: Rounds the input value to the nearest integer and outputs it as an integer type.

static.name: Value
static.description: The input value to be rounded.

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the input value rounded to the nearest integer, output as an integer type.

Parse Bool.name: Parse Bool
Parse Bool.description: Parses a string input to determine its boolean value.

static.name: Value
static.description: The input string value to be parsed as a boolean.

static.name: Result
static.description: The output boolean value resulting from parsing the input string. Commonly, 'true' (case-insensitive) will parse to true, and 'false' (case-insensitive) will parse to false. If the input cannot be parsed as a boolean, the output may default to false or throw an error based on implementation.

Parse Color.name: Parse Color
Parse Color.description: Parses a string input to determine its color value.

static.name: Value
static.description: The input string value to be parsed as a color. This can be in formats such as hex (e.g., '#ff0000' for red), RGB (e.g., 'rgb(255, 0, 0)' for red), or color names (e.g., 'red').

static.name: Result
static.description: The output color value resulting from parsing the input string. If the input string is in a valid color format, it will be converted to a color type. If the input cannot be parsed as a color, the output may default to a specific color (e.g., black) or throw an error based on implementation.

Parse Float.name: Parse Float
Parse Float.description: Parses a string input to determine its float value.

static.name: Value
static.description: The input string value to be parsed as a float. The string should represent a valid floating-point number (e.g., '3.14', '-0.001', '2e10').

static.name: Result
static.description: The output float value resulting from parsing the input string. If the input string is in a valid float format, it will be converted to a float type. If the input cannot be parsed as a float, the output may default to 0.0 or throw an error based on implementation.

Parse Int.name: Parse Int
Parse Int.description: Parses a string input to determine its integer value.

static.name: Value
static.description: The input string value to be parsed as an integer. The string should represent a valid integer number (e.g., '42', '-7', '0').

static.name: Result
static.description: The output integer value resulting from parsing the input string. If the input string is in a valid integer format, it will be converted to an integer type. If the input cannot be parsed as an integer, the output may default to 0 or throw an error based on implementation.

To String.name: To String
To String.description: Converts an input value of any type to its string representation.

static.name: Value
static.description: The input value of any type to be converted to a string representation.

static.name: Result
static.description: The output string value resulting from converting the input value to a string. The exact format of the string representation may depend on the type of the input value and the implementation of the conversion.

String Format.name: String Format
String Format.description: Formats a string using placeholders and input values.

static.name: Format
static.description: The input string format containing placeholders (e.g., 'Hello, {0}! You have {1} new messages.').

dynamic.name: Value
dynamic.description: A value to be formatted into the string, where the index of the value corresponds to the placeholder number in the format string (e.g., the first dynamic input corresponds to {0}, the second to {1}, etc.).

static.name: Result
static.description: The output string resulting from replacing the placeholders in the format string with the corresponding input values. The exact formatting may depend on the implementation of the string formatting function.

String To Lower.name: String To Lower
String To Lower.description: Converts all characters in the input string to lowercase.

static.name: Value
static.description: The input string value to be converted to lowercase.

static.name: Result
static.description: The output string value resulting from converting all characters in the input string to lowercase.

String To Upper.name: String To Upper
String To Upper.description: Converts all characters in the input string to uppercase.

static.name: Value
static.description: The input string value to be converted to uppercase.

static.name: Result
static.description: The output string value resulting from converting all characters in the input string to uppercase.

List Get First Index Of.name: List Get First Index Of
List Get First Index Of.description: Gets the first index of a specified value in a list.

static.name: List
static.description: The input list to search through.

static.name: Value
static.description: The value to find the first index of in the list.

static.name: Index
static.description: The output index of the first occurrence of the specified value in the list, or -1 if the value is not found.

Instance Get Is Private.name: Instance Get Is Private
Instance Get Is Private.description: Gets whether a specified instance is private.

static.name: Is Private
static.description: The output boolean value indicating whether the specified instance is private (true) or not (false).

If Local Player Is World Authority.name: If Local Player Is World Authority
If Local Player Is World Authority.description: Executes different outputs based on whether the local player is the world authority.

static.name: Run
static.description: The execution input to trigger the check.

static.name: Is World Authority
static.description: The execution output triggered if the local player is the world authority.

static.name: Is Not World Authority
static.description: The execution output triggered if the local player is not the world authority.

List Create.name: List Create
List Create.description: Creates a list from the input values.

dynamic.name: {dynamic_port_index}
dynamic.description: An input value to be included in the created list, where the index of the value corresponds to the dynamic port index (e.g., the first dynamic input is index 0, the second is index 1, etc.).

static.name: List
static.description: The output list containing all of the input values from the dynamic ports.

List Insert.name: List Insert
List Insert.description: Inserts a value into a list at a specified index.

static.name: List
static.description: The input list to insert the value into.

static.name: Index
static.description: The index at which to insert the value in the list. If the index is out of bounds, the value may be inserted at the end of the list or an error may occur based on implementation.

static.name: Value
static.description: The value to be inserted into the list at the specified index.

static.name: List
static.description: The output list after the value has been inserted at the specified index.

List Intersect.name: List Intersect
List Intersect.description: Outputs a list containing the values that are present in both input lists.

dynamic.name: Value
dynamic.description: An input list for the intersection operation.

static.name: Intersection
static.description: The output list containing only the values that are present in all input lists.

List Remove At.name: List Remove At
List Remove At.description: Removes a value from a list at a specified index.

static.name: List
static.description: The input list to remove the value from.

static.name: Index
static.description: The index of the value to be removed from the list. If the index is out of bounds, no value may be removed or an error may occur based on implementation.

static.name: List
static.description: The output list after the value at the specified index has been removed.

List Get Count.name: List Get Count
List Get Count.description: Gets the number of items in a list.

static.name: List
static.description: The input list to count the number of items in.

static.name: Count
static.description: The output integer value representing the number of items in the input list.

List Remove Last.name: List Remove Last
List Remove Last.description: Removes the last occurrence of a specified value from a list.

static.name: List
static.description: The input list to remove the value from.

static.name: Value
static.description: The value to be removed from the list. If the value is not found in the list, no value may be removed or an error may occur based on implementation.

static.name: List
static.description: The output list after the last occurrence of the specified value has been removed.

List Sort By Key.name: List Sort By Key
List Sort By Key.description: Sorts a list of items based on a specified key.

static.name: List
static.description: The input list of items to be sorted.

static.name: Key
static.description: The key to sort the items by. Each item in the list should be a data structure (e.g., dictionary) that contains this key. The sorting will be based on the values associated with this key in each item.

static.name: Sorted List
static.description: The output list of items sorted based on the specified key.

List Subtract.name: List Subtract
List Subtract.description: Subtracts one list from another, removing all occurrences of each element in the second list from the first list.

static.name: List A
static.description: The first input list.

static.name: List B
static.description: The second input list. All occurrences of each element in this list will be removed from the first list.

static.name: Result
static.description: The output list after subtracting the elements of the second list from the first list.

Get Authority.name: Get Authority
Get Authority.description: Gets the authority of the current player's instance.

static.name: Authority
static.description: The output integer value representing the authority level of the current player's instance. The meaning of different authority levels may depend on the context of the instance and the implementation of authority in the system.

static.name: Local Player
static.description: The output player value representing the local player in the game.

If Local Player Should Run.name: If Local Player Should Run
If Local Player Should Run.description: Executes different outputs based on whether the local player should run a specific piece of logic, often used for client-side prediction or determining if certain actions should be performed by the local player.

static.name: Run
static.description: The execution input to trigger the check.

static.name: Should Run
static.description: The execution output triggered if the local player should run the specific piece of logic.

static.name: Should Not Run
static.description: The execution output triggered if the local player should not run the specific piece of logic.

If Player Is Local.name: If Player Is Local
If Player Is Local.description: Executes different outputs based on whether a specified player is the local player.

static.name: Run
static.description: The execution input to trigger the check.

static.name: Player
static.description: The player to check against the local player.

static.name: Is Local Player
static.description: The execution output triggered if the specified player is the local player.

static.name: Is Not Local Player
static.description: The execution output triggered if the specified player is not the local player.

If Player Is Valid And Local.name: If Player Is Valid And Local
If Player Is Valid And Local.description: Executes different outputs based on whether a specified player is valid and is the local player.

static.name: Run
static.description: The execution input to trigger the check.

static.name: Player
static.description: The player to check for validity and against the local player.

static.name: Is Valid And Local
static.description: The execution output triggered if the specified player is valid and is the local player.

static.name: Is Not Valid Or Not Local
static.description: The execution output triggered if the specified player is not valid or is not the local player.

AABB Contains Point.name: AABB Contains Point
AABB Contains Point.description: Checks if an axis-aligned bounding box (AABB) contains a specific point in 3D space.

static.name: AABB Min
static.description: The minimum corner of the axis-aligned bounding box.

static.name: AABB Max
static.description: The maximum corner of the axis-aligned bounding box.

static.name: Point
static.description: The point in 3D space to check for containment within the AABB.

static.name: Contains Point
static.description: The output boolean value indicating whether the AABB contains the specified point (true) or not (false).

Get Forward Vector.name: Get Forward Vector
Get Forward Vector.description: Gets the forward direction vector based on a given rotation.

static.name: Rotation
static.description: The input rotation (e.g., in Euler angles) to calculate the forward vector from.

static.name: Forward Vector
static.description: The output forward direction vector calculated from the input rotation.

Get Up Vector.name: Get Up Vector
Get Up Vector.description: Gets the up direction vector based on a given rotation.

static.name: Rotation
static.description: The input rotation (e.g., in Euler angles) to calculate the up vector from.

static.name: Up Vector
static.description: The output up direction vector calculated from the input rotation.

Get Down Vector.name: Get Down Vector
Get Down Vector.description: Gets the down direction vector based on a given rotation.

static.name: Rotation
static.description: The input rotation (e.g., in Euler angles) to calculate the down vector from.

static.name: Down Vector
static.description: The output down direction vector calculated from the input rotation.

Get Left Vector.name: Get Left Vector
Get Left Vector.description: Gets the left direction vector based on a given rotation.

static.name: Rotation
static.description: The input rotation (e.g., in Euler angles) to calculate the left vector from.

static.name: Left Vector
static.description: The output left direction vector calculated from the input rotation.

Get Right Vector.name: Get Right Vector
Get Right Vector.description: Gets the right direction vector based on a given rotation.

static.name: Rotation
static.description: The input rotation (e.g., in Euler angles) to calculate the right vector from.

static.name: Right Vector
static.description: The output right direction vector calculated from the input rotation.

Raycast.name: Raycast
Raycast.description: Performs a raycast in the game world and outputs information about what was hit.

static.name: Origin
static.description: The starting point of the raycast in 3D space.

static.name: Direction
static.description: The direction of the raycast as a vector. This should be a normalized vector indicating the direction in which to cast the ray.

static.name: Distance
static.description: The maximum distance the ray should check for collisions. If an object is hit within this distance, it will be reported in the outputs.

static.name: Hit
static.description: The output boolean value indicating whether the raycast hit an object (true) or not (false).

static.name: Hit Position
static.description: The output position in 3D space where the raycast hit an object. If no object was hit, this may default to a zero vector or be undefined based on implementation.

static.name: Hit Normal
static.description: The output normal vector at the point of impact where the raycast hit an object. This represents the surface normal of the hit location. If no object was hit, this may default to a zero vector or be undefined based on implementation.

static.name: Hit Entity
static.description: The output entity that was hit by the raycast. If no object was hit, this may default to null or be undefined based on implementation.

Get Closest.name: Get Closest
Get Closest.description: Gets the closest item in the list based from an origin

static.name: Origin
static.description: The point in 3D space to find the closest item to.

static.name: Targets
static.description: The list of potential targets to find the closest item from.

static.name: Closest
static.description: The output item from the list that is closest to the input origin point.

static.name: Closest Index
static.description: The output index of the closest item in the input list. This corresponds to the position of the closest item in the list of targets, where the first item is index 0, the second item is index 1, etc. If the list is empty, this may default to -1 or be undefined based on implementation.

static.name: Distance
static.description: The output distance from the input origin point to the closest item.

Get Farthest.name: Get Farthest
Get Farthest.description: Gets the farthest item in the list based from an origin

static.name: Origin
static.description: The point in 3D space to find the farthest item from.

static.name: Targets
static.description: The list of potential targets to find the farthest item from.

static.name: Farthest
static.description: The output item from the list that is farthest from the input origin point.

static.name: Farthest Index
static.description: The output index of the farthest item in the input list. This corresponds to the position of the farthest item in the list of targets, where the first item is index 0, the second item is index 1, etc. If the list is empty, this may default to -1 or be undefined based on implementation.

static.name: Distance
static.description: The output distance from the input origin point to the farthest item.

Player Get Time Zone.name: Player Get Time Zone
Player Get Time Zone.description: Gets the time zone of a specified player.

static.name: Player
static.description: The player to get the time zone of.

static.name: Time Zone
static.description: Gets the amount of seconds the user is offset from UTC.

Time Get Universal Seconds.name: Time Get Universal Seconds
Time Get Universal Seconds.description: Gets the current universal time in seconds since the Unix epoch (January 1, 1970).

static.name: Seconds
static.description: The output integer value representing the current universal time in seconds since the Unix epoch (January 1, 1970).

Time Get Universal Time.name: Time Get Universal Time
Time Get Universal Time.description: Gets the current universal time as a formatted string.

static.name: Year
static.description: The output integer value representing the current year in universal time.

static.name: Month
static.description: The output integer value representing the current month (1-12) in universal time.

static.name: Day
static.description: The output integer value representing the current day of the month (1-31) in universal time.

static.name: Hour
static.description: The output integer value representing the current hour (0-23) in universal time.

static.name: Minute
static.description: The output integer value representing the current minute (0-59) in universal time.

static.name: Second
static.description: The output integer value representing the current second (0-59) in universal time.

Set Block.name: Set Block
Set Block.description: Sets a block at a specified position in the game world.

static.name: Run
static.description: The execution input to trigger the block placement.

static.name: Position
static.description: The position in 3D space where the block should be set.

static.name: Block
static.description: The block to set at the specified position. The available block types may depend on the context of the game and its implementation.

static.name: Run
static.description: The execution output triggered after the block has been set at the specified position.

static.name: Success
static.description: The output boolean value indicating whether the block was successfully set at the specified position (true) or not (false). This may depend on various factors such as whether the position is valid, whether the block type is allowed, etc.

Get Block At Position.name: Get Block At Position
Get Block At Position.description: Gets the block at a specified position in the game world.

static.name: Run
static.description: The execution input to trigger the block retrieval.

static.name: Position
static.description: The position in 3D space to get the block from.

static.name: Run
static.description: The execution output triggered after attempting to get the block at the specified position.

static.name: Block
static.description: The output block value representing the block at the specified position. If there is no block at that position, this may default to null or a special 'air' block type based on implementation.

Set Position.name: Set Position
Set Position.description: Sets the position of an entity in the game world.

static.name: Run
static.description: The execution input to trigger the position change.

static.name: Target
static.description: The entity or player to set the position of.

static.name: Position
static.description: The new position in 3D space to set the target to.

static.name: Run
static.description: The execution output triggered after attempting to set the target's position.

static.name: Success
static.description: The output boolean value indicating whether the target's position was successfully set to the new value (true) or not (false). This may depend on various factors such as whether the target is valid, whether the position is within allowed bounds, etc.

Velocity Add.name: Velocity Add
Velocity Add.description: Adds a velocity vector to an entity, causing it to move in the direction of the velocity.

static.name: Run
static.description: The execution input to trigger the velocity addition.

static.name: Target
static.description: The entity or player to add velocity to.

static.name: Velocity
static.description: The velocity vector to add to the target. This will cause the target to move in the direction of the velocity vector. The magnitude of the vector may affect how fast the target moves.

static.name: Run
static.description: The execution output triggered after attempting to add velocity to the target.

static.name: Success
static.description: The output boolean value indicating whether the velocity was successfully added to the target (true) or not (false). This may depend on various factors such as whether the target is valid, whether it can receive velocity changes, etc.

Velocity Set.name: Velocity Set
Velocity Set.description: Sets the velocity of an entity to a specific vector, causing it to move in the direction of the velocity.

static.name: Run
static.description: The execution input to trigger the velocity change.

static.name: Target
static.description: The entity or player to set the velocity of.

static.name: Velocity
static.description: The velocity vector to set for the target. This will cause the target to move in the direction of the velocity vector. The magnitude of the vector may affect how fast the target moves.

static.name: Run
static.description: The execution output triggered after attempting to set the target's velocity.

static.name: Success
static.description: The output boolean value indicating whether the target's velocity was successfully set to the new value (true) or not (false). This may depend on various factors such as whether the target is valid, whether it can receive velocity changes, etc.

Player Show Title.name: Player Show Title
Player Show Title.description: Shows a title message on the screen of a specified player.

static.name: Run
static.description: The execution input to trigger the title display.

static.name: Player
static.description: The player to show the title message to.

static.name: Title
static.description: The title message to display on the player's screen.

static.name: Subtitle
static.description: The subtitle message to display below the title on the player's screen. This is optional and may be left empty if not needed.

static.name: Duration
static.description: The duration in ticks for which the title message should be displayed on the player's screen.

static.name: Run
static.description: The execution output triggered after attempting to show the title message.

static.name: Success
static.description: The output boolean value indicating whether the title message was successfully shown to the player (true) or not (false). This may depend on various factors such as whether the player is valid, whether they can receive title messages, etc.

Player Show Action Bar.name: Player Show Action Bar
Player Show Action Bar.description: Shows an action bar message on the screen of a specified player.

static.name: Run
static.description: The execution input to trigger the action bar display.

static.name: Player
static.description: The player to show the action bar message to.

static.name: Message
static.description: The action bar message to display on the player's screen.

static.name: Duration
static.description: The duration in ticks for which the action bar message should be displayed on the player's screen.

static.name: Run
static.description: The execution output triggered after attempting to show the action bar message.

static.name: Success
static.description: The output boolean value indicating whether the action bar message was successfully shown to the player (true) or not (false). This may depend on various factors such as whether the player is valid, whether they can receive action bar messages, etc.

String Contains.name: String Contains
String Contains.description: Checks if a given string contains a specified substring.

static.name: String
static.description: The input string to check for the presence of the substring.

static.name: Contains
static.description: The string to check for within the input string.

static.name: Contains
static.description: The output boolean value indicating whether the input string contains the specified string (true) or not (false).

String Substring.name: String Substring
String Substring.description: Extracts a substring from a given string based on specified start index and length.

static.name: String
static.description: The input string to extract the substring from.

static.name: Index
static.description: The starting index in the input string from which to begin extracting the substring. The first character of the string is at index 0.

static.name: Length
static.description: The number of characters to include in the substring starting from the specified index. If this value exceeds the bounds of the string, it may be adjusted to fit within the string length based on implementation.

static.name: Substring
static.description: The output substring extracted from the input string based on the specified start index and length.

Player Force Resources.name: Player Force Resources
Player Force Resources.description: Forces a specified player to load resources, which can be useful for ensuring that they have the necessary assets for certain actions or events.

static.name: Run
static.description: The execution input to trigger the resource loading.

static.name: Resources
static.description: The resources to be loaded for the player.

static.name: Player
static.description: The player to force load resources for.

static.name: Run
static.description: The execution output triggered after attempting to force the player to load resources.

static.name: Success
static.description: The output boolean value indicating whether the player was successfully forced to load resources (true) or not (false). This may depend on various factors such as whether the player is valid, whether they can receive resource loading commands, etc.

static.name: Hash
static.description: The output string value representing a hash of the resources that were loaded for the player. This can be used to verify that the correct resources were loaded or to compare against expected resource hashes.

static.name: Download Size
static.description: The output integer value representing the size of the resources that were downloaded for the player in bytes. This can be used to track how much data was transferred during the resource loading process.
